prompt: Create a candid photorealistic film-style portrait of a young woman named anonymous young woman standing on a sunny waterfront promenade in Yokohama, Japan, with the Minato Mirai skyline in the background. She is shown from the waist up in a relaxed three-quarter back pose, turning slightly toward the camera, one hand raised near her hair, with her face intentionally covered by a plain soft-edged rectangular privacy blur in a neutral skin-tone/brown color. She has very long flowing black hair falling down her back, pale skin, and wears exactly 3 visible accessories on her wrist: a gold bracelet, a beaded bracelet, and a thin chain bracelet. Her outfit has exactly 1 visible main clothing piece: an oversized off-shoulder white T-shirt with a faint gray graphic print on the lower front. The setting includes exactly 5 key background landmarks or structures: a tall rectangular Landmark Tower on the left, several pale modern high-rise buildings in the center, a large Ferris wheel on the right, a waterfront railing with round metal posts along the right edge, and calm blue harbor water beside the promenade. Use natural morning sunlight, a gentle sea-breeze feeling, soft shadows, muted pastel colors, shallow depth of field, slight 35mm film grain, realistic proportions, and a vertical 3:4 composition. No text, no watermark, no extra people in the foreground.
